title: Percentage Distribution of Urban and Rural Households by Monthly Expenditure Bracket, Iran 1971
source_org: International Bank for Reconstruction and Development (World Bank); 'Mission estimates'
source_url: https://openknowledge.worldbank.org (World Bank Archives, Iran country documents)
extraction_method: MANUAL TRANSCRIPTION. Source document: data/raw/world-bank-archives-iran/historical-documents/1974_economic_development_vol4_statistical_appendix.pdf, Table 9.3, page 73 (PDF page 81). Rendered to PNG via pdftoppm -r 200 and visually read. No value interpolated, estimated, or fabricated.
units: percent of households (and cumulative percent) falling in each monthly-expenditure bracket (rials)
notes: Household expenditure-distribution table -- a direct proxy for consumption inequality in 1971 Iran, complementing (not duplicating) the WID.world top-income-share series already in data/processed/inequality_wid_world.csv. Source labeled 'Mission estimates', i.e. World Bank mission's own tabulation from the underlying SCI survey microdata, not a directly-published SCI table.
retrieved_by: claude (manual transcription with visual verification, pdftoppm -r 200 render + Read tool)
license_terms: World Bank Archives — public disclosure authorized document
